top_signals.title: Bitcoin rotations into altcoins collapses: Have altseasons 'disappeared'?
top_signals.summary: BTC's crypto market dominance is holding above a key support, signaling Bitcoin may keep absorbing capital from altcoins and delay a broader altseason.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Philippine SEC signals readiness for RWA tokenization
top_signals.summary: Philippine SEC Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo told Cointelegraph that tokenized assets could give Filipinos more legitimate investment options while helping steer them away from scams.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
